review_notes: v002 finisher rework (2026-07-17 QA): counter re-read as counter (clutter: taps/glasses/rag/tray, grain seams, taller constant-height panelled front face, left end seam), bar-height stools, unified shortened table pedestals (+moved floor shadows), pushed-in unoccupied north chairs, seat-08 chair front moved behind seated figures, hard-edged pixel clock, grounded phone-shelf brackets. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts; footprint and staff waist-cut edge unchanged from blockout.
